title: cytisus ciliatus var. alpestris
intro: Cytisus ciliatus var. alpestris, also known as alpine broom, is a plant species within the genus Cytisus. This perennial legume is known for its yellow flowers and is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may be attributed to its alkaloid content. In herbal preparations, alpine broom is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and is also used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
